# Confluence Constants

Local registry of all Confluence and Jira IDs for this workspace. Read by atpm skills before any Confluence sync. Updated after creating new pages or workstreams.

## Environment

| Key | Value |
|-----|-------|
| Cloud ID | `98be4c6e-817f-4ba3-88a6-12cff70a8b7e` |
| Base URL | `https://k2labs.atlassian.net/wiki` |
| Space Key | `ATPM` |
| Space ID | `6250430467` |
| Homepage ID | `6250431598` |

## Section Parents

| Section | Page ID | What goes here |
|---------|---------|----------------|
| Initiative Plans | `6296272897` | All ATPM loop initiatives (S0–S6) |
| Strategy Decisions | `6296240129` | Strategy analyses (ST1–ST4) |
| Explain Complex Topics | `6263504908` | Technical explainers |
